features.name: mixed_edge_sensitivity_with_conditional_reference
features.description: Code should include an always block with mixed edge-sensitive event list (posedge and negedge) where conditional branches reference both sensitivity list signals
features.snippet:
always @(posedge sck, negedge rst_n) begin
    if (sck) begin
        q <= 1'b0;
    end
    else if ((!rst_n)) begin
        q <= 1'b1;
    end
end
